noCompatibleAsset: No compatible download found for this platform
noCompatibleAssetManual: No package matches your current system architecture. Please download the correct installer from Releases.
readyToInstallDesc: Update has been downloaded. Click the button below to restart and install the update.

errors.missingTag: Cannot verify this update: the release tag is missing. Please update from the Releases page.
errors.metadataMissing: Could not find signed update metadata (latest.yml) for this release. Refusing to open an unverified installer.
errors.assetNotInMetadata: The downloaded file "{{name}}" is not listed in the signed update metadata. Refusing to open an unverified installer.
errors.checksumMismatch: The downloaded update failed integrity verification (checksum mismatch) and was discarded. Do not run it. Please retry or download from the Releases page.
